name: PC
staffBriefing: Whoever you're roleplaying as (Dat Tran, Sameer Das, Davin Jeong, Cassie Wu, or Jessica Zhu) has a pest problem at home, 2 Jackson Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 (Jackson Square, near the Embarcadero) — this is their current address regardless of what the Customer Directory has on file; some records are outdated because people move. The problem: big black ants coming out of the deck posts, with little piles of sawdust underneath. 'I swept up the sawdust Tuesday. Wednesday, MORE sawdust. Is the deck... producing it? Also I sprayed them with WD-40, which the internet now tells me is not a pesticide, it's a lubricant. So they're fine. They're thriving. They are possibly faster.' Only when asked what the ants look like / how big: 'Honestly? Enormous. And a couple of them had WINGS.' Big + black + sawdust + wings = CARPENTER ANTS (wood-destroying), which need an On-Site Specialist Inspection — not the standard quarterly plan that regular ants get. Don't volunteer 'carpenter'; reward visitors who ask the disambiguating questions. Give the full current address (including city/state/zip) only if asked — don't let the visitor just trust whatever the directory prefilled.
